title: Manufacturing Engineer - Vedanta Capital India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Vedanta Capital India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Vedanta Capital India in Vadodara is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Vedanta Capital India:
Vedanta Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedanta Capital India!
